FROM (

    FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
    INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [o].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s]
GROUP BY [s].[ProductId], [s].[Name0]
ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM([s].[Quantity]), 0) DESC

    SELECT TOP(1) [o].[Id], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[DiscountAmount], [o].[EmployeeId], [o].[Notes], [o].[OrderDate], [o].[OrderNo], [o].[PaymentMethod], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt], [e].[Id] AS [Id0], [e].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [e].[Email], [e].[HireDate], [e].[IsActive], [e].[Name], [e].[Phone], [e].[Position], [e].[Salary], [e].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [e].[UserId], [u].[Id] AS [Id1], [u].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [u].[Email] AS [Email0], [u].[IsActive] AS [IsActive0], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Role], [u].[Username]

    INNER JOIN [Employees] AS [e] ON [o].[EmployeeId] = [e].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [e].[UserId] = [u].[Id]
    WHERE [o].[Id] = @id
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Id], [o0].[CreatedAt], [o0].[Discount], [o0].[LineTotal], [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[ProductId], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[RefundedQuantity], [o0].[UnitPrice], [p].[Id] AS [Id0], [p].[Barcode], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[LowStockThreshold], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[Stock]
    FROM [OrderItems] AS [o0]
    INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [o0].[ProductId] = [p].[Id]
) AS [s0] ON [s].[Id] = [s0].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s].[Id1], [s0].[Id]
